Task: Move links from YT list to text file
1 Open YT on your video list
2 Move top left of browser to 0, 0 with 1,1 error margin
3 Move bottom right of browser to 960, 1030 with 1,1 error margin
4 Open notepad++ and move it to take right part of screen
5 Remove bar 'Unavailable videos are hidden' on top of playlist if present!
6 Check key positions and update them and file if needed
